content: Browser IMU best practices: DeviceOrientationEvent provides OS-fused orientation (alpha/beta/gamma Euler or absolute), DeviceMotionEvent provides accelerometer + rotationRate. iOS 13+ requires explicit requestPermission() from user gesture (click handler). Both DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission() and DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission() must be called. Default disabled in Safari iOS 12.2+ (settings toggle needed in older Safari). Firefox and Chrome handle coordinates differently — normalize in SDK. Rate: up to 60Hz on most devices, some Android allows 100Hz. Magnetometer permission needed for absolute orientation. SDK must: (1) detect permission state, (2) show permission UI button, (3) handle 'denied' gracefully with fallback to touch-only mode.
